title: Muzaffarnagar Accident: Tractor-Trolley Loses Control Disprupting a Procession in Khatauli Area, 6 Injured
description: The accident occurred near the Indira Murti area when the vehicle, which was part of the religious procession, suffered a sudden brake failure. Witnesses reported that the driver was unable to stop the descending vehicle, leading to the collision that left several participants with severe injuries.
